description: online exhibition from Baker-Cederberg Museum and Archives, Rochester General Hospital

description_wiki: DTE Energy (formerly Detroit Edison until 1996) is a Detroit-based diversified energy company involved in the development and management of energy-related businesses and services in the United States and Canada.

description: village in Cook County, Illinois, United States
description_wiki: Maywood is a village in Cook County, Illinois, United States, in the Chicago metropolitan area.
World War II, or the Second World War (1 September 1939 – 2 September 1945), was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies and the Axis powers.
World War I, or the First World War (28 July 1914 – 11 November 1918), also known as The Great War, was a global conflict between two coalitions: the Allies (or Entente) and the Central Powers.

description: Catholic research university in Chicago, Illinois, USA
description_wiki: Loyola University Chicago (Loyola  or LUC) is a private Jesuit research university in Chicago, Illinois, United States.

description: city and county seat of Macomb County, Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Mount Clemens is a city in, and county seat of, Macomb County, Michigan, United States.

description: city in and county seat of Wayne County, and largest city in State of Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Detroit (  dih-TROYT, locally also  DEE-troyt) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of Michigan.

description: hospital in Detroit, Michigan, United States
description_wiki: Henry Ford Hospital (HFH) is an 877-bed tertiary care hospital, education and research complex at the western edge of the New Center area in Detroit, Michigan.

aliases: Amateur Sports Capital of the World
description: capital city of the U.S. state of Indiana and the seat of Marion County
description_wiki: Indianapolis ( , IN-dee-ə-NAP-ə-lis), colloquially known as Indy, is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Indiana and the county seat of Marion County.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Colorado is a landlocked state in the Mountain West subregion of the Western United States.

description: city in and county seat of Pueblo County, Colorado, United States
description_wiki: Pueblo ( PWEB-loh; Spanish for "town") is the home rule municipality that is the county seat of, and the most populous municipality in, Pueblo County, Colorado, United States.

aliases: Ground forces of the United States Armed Forces
description: land service branch of the United States Armed Forces
description_wiki: The United States Army (U.S. Army) is the land service branch of the United States Armed Forces.

description: maritime branch of the United States military
description_wiki: The United States Navy (USN) is the maritime service branch of the United States Armed Forces and is designated as the navy of the United States in the Constitution.
